mapper.insert: /* adm-master-account-sql-oracle.xml mergeTtShpgLocT */ /* Converted from: MERGE INTO TT_SHPG_LOC_T ON CONFLICT */ INSERT INTO TT_SHPG_LOC_T ( SHPGLOCID, SHPGLOCCD, SHPGLOCNM, SHPGLOCTYPCD ,ADDRID, APPTNEEDYN, TELNO1, TELNO2 ,STTCD, DELYN, INSERTDATE, UPDATEDATE ,INSERTURKEY, UPDATEURKEY) VALUES (nextval('seq_tt_shpg_loc_t'), #{ackey}, #{acnm}, '1' ,#{addrid}, 'N', #{tel1}, #{tel2} ,'Y', #{delyn}, #{sysdate}, #{sysdate} ,#{surkey}, #{surkey}) ON CONFLICT (SHPGLOCCD) DO UPDATE SET SHPGLOCNM = #{acnm}, SHPGLOCTYPCD = '1', ADDRID = #{addrid}, TELNO1 = #{tel1}, TELNO2 = #{tel2}, STTCD = #{delyn}, DELYN = #{delyn}, UPDATEDATE = #{sysdate}, UPDATEURKEY = #{surkey}
mapper.select: /* adm-master-account-sql-oracle.xml selectPkAccount */ SELECT A.OWKEY ,TMOW.OWNM ,A.ACKEY ,A.ACTYPE ,A.ACNM ,A.REGNO ,A.BIZTYPE ,A.BIZCTG ,A.TEL1 ,A.TEL2 ,A.FAX ,A.CONTACT ,A.CEO ,A.UDF1 ,A.UDF2 ,A.UDF3 ,A.REPACKEY ,TMAC.ACNM AS REPACNM ,A.REPACTYPE ,A.ADDRID ,A.CLOSDATE ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,A.DELYN ,A.REGDATE ,A.EMAIL ,A.ASNUSEYN ,A.ZIPCD AS ZIPNO ,A.ZIPCD ,A.ADDR1 AS LNMADRES ,A.ADDR1 ,A.ADDR2 ,A.PLTMAXRT ,A.PNLTYALWNRT ,A.PNLTYAPLYYN ,A.SCMCK ,A.SCMURKEY , B.ADDNT, COALESCE(B.UNIT, '') UNIT , COALESCE(B.STNM, '') STNM , COALESCE(B.CTYNM, '') CTYNM , COALESCE(B.ZIPCD, '') ZIPCD , COALESCE(B.CNTRYCD, '') CNTRYCD , COALESCE(B.STACD, '') STACD , B.SHPGLOCNM , B.LAT , B.LON , B.ADDRSTTCD , CASE A.IFYN WHEN 'Y' THEN '' WHEN 'N' THEN '1' END AS ENABLE_VALUE , A.ACTYPE2 , A.ACTYPEDT , A.IFYN FROM TADMIN_MST_AC A LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW TMOW ON A.OWKEY = TMOW.OWKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ADDR_T B ON A.ADDRID = B.ADDRID LEFT OUTER JOIN TADMIN_MST_AC TMAC ON A.OWKEY = TMAC.OWKEY AND TMAC.ACKEY = A.REPACKEY WHERE A.ACKEY = #{ackey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey}

/* adm-master-account-sql-oracle.xml selectTAdminMstCt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,CTKEY ,CTNM ,( SELECT OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_OW WHERE OWKEY = #{owkey} ) AS OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_CT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND MANAGEMENTYN = 'Y' ORDER BY CTKEY

/* adm-master-account-sql-oracle.xml selectTAdminMstAcxct */ SELECT '0' AS CHK ,A.ACKEY ,A.CTKEY ,B.CTNM ,A.RNDKEY ,A.SCMCK ,A.SCMURKEY ,A.OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ACXCT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND B.DELYN ='N' WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DELYN = 'N' AND A.ACKEY = #{ackey} AND A.OWKEY = #{owkey} GROUP BY A.ACKEY ,A.OWKEY ,A.CTKEY ,B.CTNM ,A.RNDKEY ,A.SCMCK ,A.SCMURKEY ORDER BY CTKEY
